name: OpenCode
description: Runs a terminal-first open-source coding agent connecting to 75+ model providers, with automatic LSP integration, MCP support, and parallel multi-session workflows.

skills.name: Multi-Provider Coding
skills.description: Writes and edits code from the terminal using any of 75+ model providers via Models.dev with BYOK.

skills.name: LSP Integration
skills.description: Automatically wires up language servers so the agent gets accurate types, diagnostics, and symbol data.

skills.name: Parallel Sessions
skills.description: Runs multiple coding sessions in parallel over the same project without storing code or context data.
